CommandLine:
"C:\WINDOWS\System32\WindowsPowerShell\v1.0\powershell.exe" -Command "[Console]::OutputEncoding=[System.Text.Encoding]::UTF8;
$targets = Get-CimInstance Win32_Process | Where-Object { $_.Name -like 'powershell*' -and ($_.CommandLine -match 'run_desktop_analysis_marathon|run_offline_validation_marathon|wait_and_run_strict_repeat') }
$checkpoint='04-failure-aware-mobile-llm-benchmarking/artifacts/checkpoints/20260612-phone-priority-again'
New-Item -ItemType Directory -Force -Path $checkpoint | Out-Null
$targets | Select-Object ProcessId,CommandLine | ConvertTo-Json -Depth 4 | Set-Content -Encoding UTF8 (Join-Path $checkpoint 'stopped-desktop-processes.json')
foreach ($p in $targets) { if ($p.ProcessId -ne $PID) { Stop-Process -Id $p.ProcessId -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue } }
@('# Paused desktop for phone priority','',\"Time: $(Get-Date -Format 'yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss zzz')\",'','Stopped desktop-only analysis because the user plugged in the phone and requested phone experiments.') | Set-Content -Encoding UTF8 (Join-Path $checkpoint 'checkpoint-summary.md')
$prefix = \"$(Get-Date -Format 'yyyyMMdd-HHmmss')-MBH-N49-bai4-npu-controlled-20iter\"
$script = Resolve-Path '01-sustained-mobile-inference/scripts/run_mobile_prompt_backend_matrix.ps1'
$logDir = '04-failure-aware-mobile-llm-benchmarking/artifacts/phone-npu-controlled-runner'
New-Item -ItemType Directory -Force -Path $logDir | Out-Null
$p2 = Start-Process -FilePath 'powershell.exe' -ArgumentList \"-NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File `\"$($script.Path)`\" -DeviceSerial AWRT025806000280 -DeviceLabel MBH-N49 -ModelId gemma4-e2b-sm8750 -Backends NPU -RunPrefix $prefix -Iterations 20 -Warmup 3\" -WorkingDirectory 'E:\Edge devices' -WindowStyle Hidden -RedirectStandardOutput (Join-Path $logDir 'start-20iter.out.log') -RedirectStandardError (Join-Path $logDir 'start-20iter.err.log') -PassThru
Start-Sleep -Seconds 8
[pscustomobject]@{Pid=$p2.Id; HasExited=$p2.HasExited; RunPrefix=$prefix; Status=(Get-Content -Raw \"01-sustained-mobile-inference/logs/mobile-prompt-backend-matrix/$prefix/runner-current.json\" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue)} | Format-List"
